name: ansan-safe-coast-ai
description: Static MVP dashboard for Ansan public data and AI safety prevention contest.

scripts.pipeline:real-start: node scripts/collect_kcg_accident_stats.js && node scripts/train_history_prior_model.js && node scripts/preprocess_demo_data.js
scripts.check: node --check assets/js/app.js && node --check scripts/collect_kcg_accident_stats.js && node --check scripts/train_history_prior_model.js && node scripts/preprocess_demo_data.js --check
